message.content:
@startuml
title login by token

actor "学术袁" as User
participant "App客户端" as App
participant "后台服务器" as Server

User -> App : 启动
activate App
App -> App : 检测本地登录信息

alt [有本地记录]
  alt [token有效]
    App -> Server : token自动登陆
  else [token无效]
    App -> User : 提示登录
    User -> App : 输入手机号+密码
    App -> Server : 手机号+密码登录
    Server --> App : 返回新的token
    App -> App : token保存
  end
else [无本地记录]
  App -> User : 提示输入手机号
  App -> Server : 请求发送验证码
  Server --> App : 返回验证码
  User -> App : 输入验证码
  App -> Server : 请求后台验证

  alt [已注册]
    App -> User : 提示登录
    User -> App : 输入手机号+密码
    App -> Server : 手机号+密码登录
    Server --> App : 返回新的token
    App -> App : token保存
  else [未注册]
    App -> User : 提示注册
    User -> App : 输入两次密码
    App -> Server : 请求注册
    Server --> App : 返回新的token
    App -> App : token保存
  end
end

deactivate App
@enduml
